title: Weapon Arsenal (Legacy)
description: When the Sharpest Blade isn't enough
body:
# Weapon Arsenal

Just adds a bunch of weapons with more coming soon. There isn't much to say except for what currently avalible and whats comming soon.

## Weapons

- Lost Sword of God
- Sword of the Devil
- No-life's Withering Scythe
- Portal Maker's Poison Dagger
- Lighting Striker (Enchantment (Levels: 4))
